reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified its status, sent a mathematical query, and received the correct response mentioning "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully showing the agent list in the sidebar with two agents visible
Found and clicked the agent "QA-20260715-214853-42ob" in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent page with URL /agents/qa-20260715-214853-42ob-0c7841y4hg
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status displayed as "idle" which meets the requirement
Clicked on the message input field — Input field was focused and ready for text entry
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully entered into the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent and the page navigated to a new chat session with URL containing session ID c4a36261-f296-43d1-8d86-e6c9985e1d10

Waited for response and verified it mentions "4" — Agent responded with "2 + 2 = 4" within 1 second, clearly showing the number 4 in the response. The session was automatically titled "Basic Math Question Session"

Took a screenshot — Screenshot saved as agent_response_verification.png showing the complete conversation with user message on the right ("Hello! What is 2+2?") and agent response on the left ("2 + 2 = 4")
